title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 14–16, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I've known him since I was a kid!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: No wonder I thought you looked familiar...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I just realized that a moment ago

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But, I'm pretty sure he is on shanks the red-haired's ship!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yasopp is one of my favorite pirates in that crew!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So he is on that red- haired...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Of course! He is a great pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Is my dad really on that great ship?

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Great...? Yeah! His shooting skill is the best,

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Yasop never misses any- thing within his range

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Of course! Even if it's between the eyes of an ant, I can still shoot it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I know, you've told me a hundred times already!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I'm gonna tell it... so you have to listen to it no matter how many times!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I had to force myself to leave him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Because the pirate flag was calling me!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
